sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἑσπέρα

- Transliteration: hespera

- Phonetic: hes-per'-ah

- Definition:

1. evening, eventide

- Origin: from an adjective hesperos (evening)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: Feminine of an adjective ἑσπερός hesperos (evening); the eve (G5610 being implied): - evening (-tide).
